command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
JOB_ID='phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2'
RUN_ID='bg-20260623T210555Z-6099f8d1'
WS="memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/$RUN_ID"

echo '=RUN STATE NOW='
python3 -c "
import json
from pathlib import Path
s=json.loads(Path('$WS/run-state.json').read_text())
print('status:', s.get('status'))
print('attempt:', s.get('attempt_number'))
print('attempt_id:', s.get('attempt_id'))
print('pid:', s.get('worker_pid'))
print('lease_expires:', s.get('lease_expires_at'))
" 2>/dev/null

echo '=PID ALIVE='
PID=73909
kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null && echo PID_ALIVE || echo PID_DEAD

echo '=LATEST LIVENESS HB='
python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; p=Path('$WS/heartbeat-liveness.json'); d=json.loads(p.read_text()) if p.is_file() else {}; print('stage:', d.get('stage')); print('ts:', d.get('ts'))" 2>/dev/null

echo '=LEDGER TAIL='
tail -3 "$WS/event-ledger.ndjson" 2>/dev/null

echo '=AUDIT LOG='
tail -3 memory/operator/audit/wave1-audit.jsonl 2>/dev/null || tail -3 memory/audit/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo NO_AUDIT_ENTRIES_YET
ENDSSH
